stories.title: Copy of What's up with SGA? Can Wemby really do this? What...
stories.summary: What was most surprising about Spurs' Game 6 win? And who is biggest X factor for Saturday's game?

stories.title: Spurs roll past Thunder as WCF head to Game 7
stories.summary: With the Spurs facing elimination, Victor Wembanyama led the charge Thursday night with 28 points and 10 rebounds in a 118-91 blowout of the Thunder to send the Western Conference finals to a Game 7.

stories.title: Williams ineffective in return, SGA off in OKC los...
stories.summary: Jalen Williams scored only one point in his return from a hamstring strain, and Shai Gilgeous-Alexander finished with less than half his regular-season average as the Thunder dropped Game 6 to the Spurs.

stories.title: 4-time Cup champ Claude Lemieux dies at 60
stories.summary: Claude Lemieux, who won the Stanley Cup four times during a memorable NHL career, died Thursday at age 60. Authorities said Lemieux died by suicide.

stories.title: Hammon calls out refs, 'tired' of Aces' FT dispari...
stories.summary: Aces coach Becky Hammon blasted the officiating in Thursday's 95-87 loss to the Wings, saying that A'ja Wilson, Chennedy Carter and Jackie Young combining for one free throw attempt was a result of "not getting the same whistle."
